samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages. The output result is available on the result port, and the o_en = 1 indicates the availability of the result.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="PIPELINE_STAGES">3</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg>reg_i_en[3:0]</reg> = 4'b0;
            <reg>reg_result[64:0]</reg> = 65'b0;
            <reg>reg_carry[64:0]</reg> = 65'b0;
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <reg>reg_i_en[0]</reg> = i_en;
            <reg>reg_i_en[1]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0]);
            <reg>reg_i_en[2]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[1]);
            <reg>reg_i_en[3]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[2]);
            <reg>reg_result[3:0]</reg> = (adda[3:0] + addb[3:0]);
            <reg>reg_result[7:4]</reg> = (adda[7:4] + addb[7:4] + reg_carry[3]);
            <reg>reg_result[11:8]</reg> = (adda[11:8] + addb[11:8] + reg_carry[7]);
            <reg>reg_result[15:12]</reg> = (adda[15:12] + addb[15:12] + reg_carry[11]);
            <reg>reg_result[19:16]</reg> = (adda[19:16] + addb[19:16] + reg_carry[15]);
            <reg>reg_result[23:20]</reg> = (adda[23:20] + addb[23:20] + reg_carry[19]);
            <reg>reg_result[27:24]</reg> = (adda[27:24] + addb[27:24] + reg_carry[23]);
            <reg>reg_result[31:28]</reg> = (adda[31:28] + addb[31:28] + reg_carry[27]);
            <reg>reg_result[35:32]</reg> = (adda[35:32] + addb[35:32] + reg_carry[31]);
            <reg>reg_result[39:36]</reg> = (adda[39:36] + addb[39:36] + reg_carry[35]);
            <reg>reg_result[43:40]</reg> = (adda[43:40] + addb[43:40] + reg_carry[39]);
            <reg>reg_result[47:44]</reg> = (adda[47:44] + addb[47:44] + reg_carry[43]);
            <reg>reg_result[51:48]</reg> = (adda[51:48] + addb[51:48] + reg_carry[47]);
            <reg>reg_result[55:52]</reg> = (adda[55:52] + addb[55:52] + reg_carry[51]);
            <reg>reg_result[59:56]</reg> = (adda[59:56] + addb[59:56] + reg_carry[55]);
            <reg>reg_result[63:60]</reg> = (adda[63:60] + addb[63:60] + reg_carry[59]);
            <reg>reg_result[64:63]</reg> = (adda[63:60] + addb[63:60] + reg_carry[63]);
        </combinational_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg>reg_result[64:0]</reg> = (adda[63:0] + addb[63:0] + reg_carry[63]);
            <reg>reg_carry[64:0]</reg> = {65{1'b0}};
            <reg>reg_carry[3:0]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0]);
            <reg>reg_carry[7:4]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1]);
            <reg>reg_carry[11:8]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1] || reg_i_en[2]);
            <reg>reg_carry[15:12]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1] || reg_i_en[2] || reg_i_en[3]);
            <reg>reg_carry[19:16]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1] || reg_i_en[2] || reg_i_en[3] || reg_i_en[4]);
            <reg>reg_carry[23:20]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1] || reg_i_en[2] || reg_i_en[3] || reg_i_en[4] || reg_i_en[5]);
            <reg>reg_carry[27:24]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1] || reg_i_en[2] || reg_i_en[3] || reg_i_en[4] || reg_i_en[5] || reg_i_en[6]);
            <reg>reg_carry[31:28]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1] || reg_i_en[2] || reg_i_en[3] || reg_i_en[4] || reg_i_en[5] || reg_i_en[6] || reg_i_en[7]);
            <reg>reg_carry[35:32]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1] || reg_i_en[2] || reg_i_en[3] || reg_i_en[4] || reg_i_en[5] || reg_i_en[6] || reg_i_en[7] || reg_i_en[8]);
            <reg>reg_carry[39:36]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1] || reg_i_en[2] || reg_i_en[3] || reg_i_en[4] || reg_i_en[5] || reg_i_en[6] || reg_i_en[7] || reg_i_en[8] || reg_i_en[9]);
            <reg>reg_carry[43:40]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1] || reg_i_en[2] || reg_i_en[3] || reg_i_en[4] || reg_i_en[5] || reg_i_en[6] || reg_i_en[7] || reg_i_en[8] || reg_i_en[9] || reg_i_en[10]);
            <reg>reg_carry[47:44]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1] || reg_i_en[2] || reg_i_en[3] || reg_i_en[4] || reg_i_en[5] || reg_i_en[6] || reg_i_en[7] || reg_i_en[8] || reg_i_en[9] || reg_i_en[10] || reg_i_en[11]);
            <reg>reg_carry[51:48]</reg> = (i_en || reg_i_en[0] || reg_i_en[1] || reg_i_en[2] || reg_i_en[3] || reg_i_en[4] || reg
